series_metadata.series_description: As of 01/21/2018 the Ohio State Barber Board has been abolished and all active and retained schedules have moved to the State Cosmetology and Barber Board. This series contains monthly report of student''''''''s hours as required from private and Institutional Barber Schools to verify attendance and hours earned towards completion of course program.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: course is completed. All hours must be completed within or student begins losing training hours ; Electronic: Continually maintained and updated course is completed. All hours must be completed within or student begins losing training hours
